name: Knights of the Tiny Table
short_description: Help King Arthur and his Knights defend the realm. Slay the evil entities with a combination of lucky dice rolls and clever tactics.
detailed_description:
King Arthur and his Knights have taken up arms against the evil enemies of the realm. Every battle is a randomly generated challenge that will test your smarts and luck. Winning battles will fill the war chest of Camelot, losing them will impact King Arthur's health.

Key Features:
  • Dice-based tactics: Roll the dice and deploy Knights to defeat the enemies, through a combination of strategy and luck.
  • Arthurian heroes: Each Knight has his own attack pattern. Use their advantages to solve the tactical puzzles.
  • Procedural score attack: Win as many randomly generated battles as efficently as possible to set the highest score.
